---
title: "Historical Seasons"
---

Browse any monsoon season from 1991 to the present. Each card opens that year's daily synoptic player, season Hovmöller diagram, and 5-day evolution grids. Years without a thumbnail haven't had their diagnostics generated yet — the page still loads, it just won't have much on it.

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
years <- 2025:1991  # newest first

cat('<div class="season-grid">\n')

for (y in years) {
  thumb <- sprintf("output/frames/%d/dashboard_%d0601.png", y, y)
  has_data <- file.exists(thumb)

  if (has_data) {
    cat(sprintf(
      '<a class="season-card" href="years/%d.qmd">
  <img src="%s" alt="%d monsoon season thumbnail" loading="lazy" />
  <div class="season-card-label">%d</div>
</a>\n',
      y, thumb, y, y
    ))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf(
      '<a class="season-card season-card-pending" href="years/%d.qmd">
  <div class="season-card-placeholder">Data&nbsp;pending</div>
  <div class="season-card-label">%d</div>
</a>\n',
      y, y
    ))
  }
}

cat('</div>\n')
```
